PostToolUse.windows: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$input = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $toolName = $input.toolName; $filePath = $input.toolInput.filePath; if ($toolName -in @('create_file','replace_string_in_file','multi_replace_string_in_file') -and $filePath -match 'docs[\\/].*\.md$|mkdocs\.yml$') { Write-Host '🔍 Validation MkDocs en cours...'; $result = py -m mkdocs build --strict 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $output = @{ continue = $false; stopReason = "Erreur MkDocs build : $($result -join ' ')"; systemMessage = "La modification a causé une erreur MkDocs. Corrige avant de continuer." } | ConvertTo-Json; Write-Output $output; exit 2 } else { Write-Host '✅ MkDocs build OK' } }"
